errors.note: Pre-existing SSR head-tag timing issue in SolidStart — unrelated to this landing-page fix. Not in scope per Craig's instructions (hero/stats/tech-row/rhythm only).

visual.note: All 12 errors are pre-existing: 7x visual:font-fallback in apps/web/src/app.css, 1x visual:body-overflow-hidden in apps/web/src/app.css, 3x visual:img-dimensions in apps/web/src/routes/repos.tsx, 1x visual:img-dimensions in packages/ui/src/components/Avatar.tsx. None are in the files I changed. None correspond to Craig's reported bugs.

accessibility.note: Pre-existing errors in unrelated components (CommandPalette.tsx input-label, CookieConsent.tsx + DeploymentLogs.tsx reduced-motion-js, GenerativeUI.tsx input-label). Not regressed by this fix.

links.note: Clean. No regressions from the Playwright removal or the landing-page restructure.

craigReportedBugsFixed.bug: Stats row misaligned — third column taller due to mid-hyphen wrap
craigReportedBugsFixed.howFixed: CSS grid with grid-auto-rows: 1fr forces equal cell heights; white-space: nowrap + word-break: keep-all on .landing-stat-value prevents mid-hyphen wrap; max-width: 18ch on .landing-stat-label caps line length predictably.

Source was already items-center text-center; tightened the mt-28 → mt-20 gap between CTAs and proof strip and reduced over-padded hero (pt-40 pb-44 lg:pt-52 lg:pb-56 → pt-32 pb-32 md:pt-40 md:pb-36 lg:pt-44 lg:pb-40) so the viewport feels balanced on iPad landscape.

craigReportedBugsFixed.bug: Tech row cramped — 5-7 items squeezed into one row
craigReportedBugsFixed.howFixed: Replaced flex-wrap + column-gap:3rem with CSS grid template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(11rem, 1fr)). Balanced row at every viewport; 2-3 rows on iPad landscape without flex-wrap jostle.

craigReportedBugsFixed.bug: Section rhythm jumpy — mix of py-32 and py-44
craigReportedBugsFixed.howFixed: Unified every section to py-28 lg:py-36. Hero uses a per-breakpoint ramp that matches the same rhythm.

honestAssessment.explanation: GateTest's --crawl mode only wires up liveCrawler (missing-title, http-error). The static visual / accessibility modules pattern-match source for generic issues (font fallbacks, img dimensions, reduced-motion) and did not flag ANY of Craig's four reported bugs. GateTest has no rule for column-height-equality, mid-hyphen-wrap inside a value, flex-wrap cramping at specific viewport widths, or vertical-rhythm consistency. This is product feedback for ccantynz-alt/gatetest — see FINDINGS.md for the proposed gap list.
